profile_snapshot.note: report_integrity is same_process_candidate_writable: a determined in-process patch can forge the JUnit report and exit code together. Guard blocks the harness edits/deletions and stdout forgery agents do in practice; it does not stop deliberate process-level forgery in source. The container modes isolate the host, not the report. Use --blackbox for external_process_isolated. See docs/ASSURANCE.md.
